---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com

---

Hi, I'm Kamal, 
recent ECE graduate (Class of 2026) from the Chandigarh area.
Like many, my college tech journey was a chaotic loop of starting languages, getting distracted by the rapid evolution of AI, and falling into the trap of passive "vibe coding"—blindly copy-pasting code from LLMs just to make things work.
After graduating without a job and realizing how much time I wasted navigating the noise, I decided to break the cycle.
I am joining this AI engineering cohort to build a rock-solid, hands-on foundation in RAG, LLM pipelines, and system orchestration. 
This blog is my space to stop procrastinating, trade passive tutorials for active shipping, and document my transition from a distracted graduate to a disciplined AI Engineer.
